summary: Migrated several fighter `code_*.s` assembly translation units into `src/melee/ft/*.c` files, mostly by preserving existing assembly bodies as MWERKS-style inline `asm` functions while adding C includes, prototypes, static float constants, and build-system entries. The PR also cleaned up broad headers by removing many declarations from `include/functions.h` and `include/variables.h`, moving or exposing declarations through more specific headers such as `code_80081938.h`, `code_80081B38.h`, `mpcoll.h`, `mplib.h`, `ftwalljump.h`, `text_2.h`, and `lbunknown_003.h`. It renamed at least one known function use from `func_80084A40` to `Stage_GetGroundFrictionMultiplier` in remaining assembly callsites.
what_changed: Replaced `asm/melee/ft/code_8007C114.s`, `asm/melee/ft/code_8007C630.s`, `asm/melee/ft/code_80081938.s`, and `asm/melee/ft/code_80081B38.s` build objects with corresponding C translation units under `src/melee/ft/` in `obj_files.mk`.

Converted assembly files into C files using `#include` directives, local/static constants, explicit function signatures, `#pragma push`, `asm` function bodies, and `nofralloc` to preserve existing instruction bodies.
Removed many fighter-related declarations from the global `include/functions.h`, reducing reliance on a catch-all declarations header.

Added narrower headers for newly migrated or referenced code paths, including `code_80081938.h`, `code_80081B38.h`, `ftwalljump.h`, `text_2.h`, `ft_unknown_006.h`, `lbunknown_003.h`, `mpcoll.h`, and `mplib.h`.

Cleaned up local `extern` declarations in character and subsystem files now covered by headers, including Game & Watch, Master Hand, Ness, Pikachu, `ftcommon`, `ftlib`, item, and collision-related files.
Updated remaining assembly callsite labels from `func_80084A40` to the more meaningful `Stage_GetGroundFrictionMultiplier` in `asm/melee/ft/chara/ftkirby.s` and `asm/melee/ft/ft_unknown_006.s`.
Refined `HSD_GObjList` in `include/sysdolphin/baselib/gobj.h` to use `HSD_GObj*` typedefs and named the item list field `x24_items`; also exposed `lbl_804D782C` as `HSD_GObjList*` there.
Removed the duplicate/less appropriate `struct r13_EntityPointers` definition from `include/sysdolphin/baselib/objalloc.h`.
smart_moves: Used C translation units with inline assembly as an incremental migration step: this keeps exact instruction behavior while allowing normal C includes, declarations, constants, and build-system organization.
Moved broad declarations out of `include/functions.h` and into more specific subsystem headers, reducing global namespace noise and making dependencies more explicit.

Converted `.s` local float data such as `lbl_804D8320`, `lbl_804D8324`, `lbl_804D8328`, and `lbl_804D832C` into `static f32 const` values in the new C files, preserving addressable constants while fitting C compilation.
Renamed `func_80084A40` to `Stage_GetGroundFrictionMultiplier` where known, improving semantic searchability for fighter physics and ground-friction code.
Added includes at callsites, for example `src/melee/ft/chara/ftPikachu/ftpikachu4.c` including `<melee/ft/code_80081B38.h>`, instead of keeping stray extern declarations.
Kept existing assembly labels and comments inside inline asm, which preserves traceability to original addresses during staged decompilation.
decomp_lessons: For large assembly islands, first migrate `.s` files into `.c` files with inline asm when full C matching is not ready; this unlocks header hygiene and typed interfaces without requiring every function to be decompiled immediately.
When migrating an asm file to C, replace `.section .sdata2` float literals with `static f32 const` declarations near the top of the C file and update inline asm references accordingly.
Prefer subsystem-specific headers over `include/functions.h`; removing declarations from global headers forces dependencies to be explicit and makes future decomp work easier to reason about.
Known semantic names should be propagated even in still-assembly files, as with `Stage_GetGroundFrictionMultiplier`, because it improves grepability and documents intent before full decompilation.
If an r13/global structure is really a baselib GObj list, define it in the baselib GObj header rather than leaving duplicate ad-hoc structs in unrelated headers.
Build migration is part of decomp migration: update `obj_files.mk` from `asm/...s.o` to `src/...c.o` in the same change so object ordering and linkage remain explicit.
naming_conventions: `func_80084A40` was renamed or aliased in callsites as `Stage_GetGroundFrictionMultiplier`, indicating a convention of replacing address-based names with subsystem-prefixed semantic names when behavior is known.
`HSD_GObjList` fields kept offset-style names where semantics are unknown, such as `x0`, `x4`, and `x28`, while known slots gained semantic suffixes such as `x20_fighters` and `x24_items`.
Migrated files retained address-based filenames like `code_8007C114.c` and function names like `func_8007C114` where broader semantics were not yet established.
Header names mirror the migrated source filenames for address-named code islands, for example `code_80081938.h` and `code_80081B38.h`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used MWERKS-style inline `asm` functions with `#pragma push` / `#pragma pop` and `nofralloc` to preserve exact assembly while compiling as C.
Preserved original instruction comments and labels inside inline asm blocks, maintaining address-level provenance during migration.
Changed small-data references in inline asm from `symbol@sda21(r2/r13)` style to `symbol(r2/r13)` style after moving symbols into C-visible declarations.
Used typed function signatures such as `asm void func_8007C114(HSD_GObj* fighterObj)` around otherwise unchanged asm bodies, improving interface information without risking mismatch.
Kept unresolved callees as `extern` declarations with weak types such as `unk_t` where exact signatures were not yet evident.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the provided PR slice, so no human review feedback can be extracted.
searchable_terms: Migrate ft code asm to C
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully decompile functions inside `src/melee/ft/code_8007C114.c`, `code_8007C630.c`, `code_80081938.c`, or `code_80081B38.c` after this inline-asm migration.
Search for later renames of address-based functions removed from `include/functions.h`, especially `func_8007C114`, `func_8007C630`, `func_80081938`, and `func_80081B38`.
Look for subsequent cleanup of `HSD_GObjList`, `lbl_804D782C`, `x20_fighters`, and `x24_items` to see whether the global object list structure was refined further.
Search for additional uses of `Stage_GetGroundFrictionMultiplier` to confirm the semantic name replaced `func_80084A40` project-wide.
Check later header cleanup PRs for continued movement away from `include/functions.h` toward subsystem-specific headers.
